query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mileage_log (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, userId INT NOT NULL, jobId INT NULL, date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, startMileage DECIMAL(10,1) NULL, endMileage DECIMAL(10,1) NULL, distanceMiles DECIMAL(8,2) NOT NULL, purpose ENUM('delivery','reposition','personal') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'delivery', notes TEXT NULL, createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
